attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,
HDRS.REVISION_NUM AS BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT,
COALESCE( REVISED_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01') AS LAST_REVISED_DT,
CASE WHEN ( NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY IS NULL AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA' ) THEN -665 ELSE NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY END AS VENDOR_PTY_KEY,
COALESCE(EPAPF.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) BUYER_CISCO_WORKER_PTY_KEY,
CAST( HDRS.CREATION_DATE  AS DATE ) PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT,
HDRS.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG AS CURRENT_RECORD_FLG,
( NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT * 100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
CASE WHEN ( NAVPLC.LOCATOR_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -665 ELSE NAVPLC.LOCATOR_KEY END AS RECEIVING_LOCATION_LOCATOR_KEY,
APPROVED_DATE AS APPROVAL_DTM,
CAST( APPROVED_DATE AS DATE ) AS DV_APPROVAL_DT	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) , 
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) , 
USER , 
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE FROM
(
SELECT
STPO.REVISION_NUM,
STPO.REVISED_DATE,
STPO.CREATION_DATE,
STPO.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
STPO.AUTHORIZATION_STATUS,
STPO.PO_HEADER_ID,
STPO.GLOBAL_NAME,
STPO.VENDOR_ID,
STPO.AGENT_ID,
STPO.APPROVED_DATE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_HEADERS_ARCHIVE_ALL STPO
WHERE STPO.AUTHORIZATION_STATUS ='APPROVED'
UNION ALL
SELECT
EXPO.REVISION_NUM,
EXPO.REVISED_DATE,
EXPO.CREATION_DATE,
EXPO.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
EXPO.AUTHORIZATION_STATUS,
EXPO.PO_HEADER_ID,
EXPO.GLOBAL_NAME,
EXPO.VENDOR_ID,
EXPO.AGENT_ID,
EXPO.APPROVED_DATE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_PO_HEADERS_ARCHIVE_ALL EXPO
WHERE EXPO.AUTHORIZATION_STATUS ='APPROVED'
)
HDRS

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON ( HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
ON ( NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = HDRS.PO_HEADER_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPO.SS_CD)

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
ON ( HDRS.APPROVED_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE )

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_PRTY NAPVP
ON ( HDRS.VENDOR_ID = NAPVP.SK_VENDOR_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NAPVP.BK_SS_CD )

LEFT JOIN  ( SELECT AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY,LOCATOR_KEY,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_AP_VNDR_PARTY_LOC_ASGMT NAVPLC
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC) = 1 ) NAVPLC
ON ( NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY = NAVPLC.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY
AND NAVPLC.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('SHIP_TO','UNKNOWN') )

LEFT JOIN(
SELECT 
PERSON_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
BK_EMPLOYEE_ID,EMPLOYEE_NUMBER
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EPAP
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
ON EPAP.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID ) EPAPF 
ON ( HDRS.AGENT_ID = EPAPF.PERSON_ID
AND HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME = EPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT
PO_HEADER_ID	,
AGENT_ID	,
TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
SEGMENT1	,
SUMMARY_FLAG	,

RETRO_PRICE_APPLY_UPDATES_FLAG	,
UPDATE_SOURCING_RULES_FLAG	,
AUTO_SOURCING_FLAG	,
CREATED_LANGUAGE	,

SUPPLIER_AUTH_ENABLED_FLAG	,

AME_TRANSACTION_TYPE	,
ENABLE_ALL_SITES	,
GES_UPDATE_DATE	,
GLOBAL_NAME	,
ACTION_CD	,
CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_HEADERS_ARCHIVE_ALL HDRS WHERE AUTHORIZATION_STATUS='APPROVED'
AND
NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO , $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
WHERE
NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = HDRS.PO_HEADER_ID
AND HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPO.SS_CD )
OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM WHERE HDRS.APPROVED_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE )
